generated_exposure.exposure_text: As we get older, we remember what it was like when we weren't the world's sole superpower. Our military isn't just about us - it's what keeps our allies from being bullied. I've seen firsthand how cuts to defense leave gaps that take years to fill. We can't afford to be penny-wise and pound-foolish with national security. #StrongerTogether #DefendOurValues
